config_file_locations.windows_note: Two separate locations. UserSettings.json lives under Documents and is overwritten by the in-game menu. Engine override INIs must be created (not edited) inside the game install at engine\config\platform\pc\ — create a new .ini file there (any filename); never edit existing engine INIs as patches restore them.

keys.effect: Multiplier for texture and geometry streaming distance. Higher values reduce pop-in at the cost of VRAM and CPU streaming bandwidth.
keys.notes: Default is 1.0. Values above 1.5 have diminishing returns and cause significant VRAM pressure on large open-world scenes. Place in a custom .ini file under engine\config\platform\pc\ — survives game patches.

keys.effect: Distance at which NPCs receive full physics rig simulation (cloth, hair, accessories). Higher values activate rigs further from the camera at CPU cost.
keys.notes: Default is 3. Values above 8 stress the CPU in dense NPC scenes and typically show no visible improvement beyond that point.
Only active when ray tracing reflections are disabled in the in-game Graphics menu. If RT reflections or Path Tracing is enabled, this key has no effect.
